message:
feat: Load HTTP security policy from .edgebox.json with safe defaults

- Parse allowedUrls, blockedUrls, rateLimitRps, maxConnections from config
- Connect config to g_security_policy at startup
- Default: permissive (no restrictions) - security is opt-in
- Add useKeychain option (default: false) for API key access
- Keychain runs on host side only, WASM cannot access directly
